mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS sm_cnt FROM fd_apartment_manager m JOIN fd_apartment a ON m.view_apt_id = a.apt_id AND a.isDel = '0' JOIN fd_device d ON a.apt_id = d.apt_id WHERE m.apt_id = '00000' AND d.apt_id != '00000' #파이어독스 아파트 단말기 제외 AND m.isDel = '0' AND a.isControl = '0'

SELECT a.apt_id, a.apt_nm, a.address, u.user_nm, a.apt_tel, COUNT(d.device_id) AS cnt FROM fd_apartment_manager m JOIN fd_apartment a ON m.view_apt_id = a.apt_id AND a.isDel = '0' JOIN fd_user_metering u ON a.apt_id = u.apt_id AND u.user_kind = 'SKIN0000' AND u.isDel = '0' JOIN fd_device d ON a.apt_id = d.apt_id WHERE m.apt_id = '00000' AND d.apt_id != '00000' #파이어독스 아파트 단말기 제외 AND m.isDel = '0' GROUP BY a.apt_id

SELECT a.apt_nm, d.serial_no, c.bldg_id, c.cust_nm, CASE WHEN c.isType = '1' THEN '열량계' WHEN c.isType = '2' THEN '온수' WHEN c.isType = '3' THEN '수도' WHEN c.isType = '4' THEN '난방' WHEN c.isType = '5' THEN '전기' WHEN c.isType = '6' THEN '가스' WHEN c.isType = '7' THEN '누수' ELSE '' END AS isType, hl.tran_dttm, CASE WHEN hl.dvc_status = '1' THEN '전원 OFF' WHEN hl.dvc_status = '2' THEN '상시전원' WHEN hl.dvc_status = '4' THEN '배터리전원' WHEN hl.dvc_status = 'A' THEN '상시전원 + 계량기고장' WHEN hl.dvc_status = 'C' THEN '배터리전원 + 계량기고장' WHEN hl.dvc_status = '9' THEN '전원없음 + 계량기고장' WHEN hl.dvc_status = '65' THEN '탈착' ELSE '' END AS dvc_status, IF (TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR,hl.tran_dttm,NOW()) >= 25, '통신점검', '') AS comm_error FROM fd_device d JOIN fd_custmst c ON d.apt_id = c.apt_id AND d.device_id = c.device_id AND c.isDel = '0' JOIN fd_apartment a ON a.apt_id = d.apt_id AND a.isDel = '0' LEFT JOIN fd_tran_meter_history_lst hl ON d.device_id = hl.device_id AND c.isType = hl.isType WHERE a.apt_id NOT IN ('00000','00027') AND d.device_stts_cd = 'SAST0001' AND ( hl.dvc_status IN ('1', 'A', 'C', '9', '65') OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR,hl.tran_dttm,NOW()) >= 25 ) ORDER BY a.apt_id ASC, d.serial_no, d.isType
